content: Duress/panic-PIN design: must not behave suspiciously (no visible wipe, no crash, no unusual delay) — the decoy path should be a fully separate, independently encrypted state, not a filtered view, so forensic correlation is harder; full destructive wipe on duress is itself detectable/incriminating evidence, so covert-alert-with-normal-looking-decoy-UI is generally safer than data destruction for a personal-safety app.
